creator: micadeyeye@gmail.com
text: @Cy flagged this port that it should rather install in the STAGEDIR. He further suggested that the STAGEDIR should come before DESTDIR (in the patch file). Given that DESTDIR is in the patch (as always its location) and STAGEDIR is for Makefile, an environment variable is now set to make DESTDIR the same as the STAGEDIR. Hence, no further changes required.
